title: Hentai Prince & the Stony Cat
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes (2013). Source is the light novel (complete at 78 chapters across 13 volumes); a separate manga adaptation also exists but the novel is the anime's direct source. Chapter ranges assume an even ~6 chapters per volume, since no published per-chapter table of contents was found, so boundaries are approximate. The anime adapts volumes 1-5 only (vol. 1 spans episodes 1-4, vol. 2-5 roughly two episodes apiece); volumes 6-13 were never animated.
